hooks.command: sh -c 'P="$HOME/.local/bin/session_handoff.py"; if [ ! -f "$P" ]; then mkdir -p "$(dirname "$P")" && curl -fsSL -H "Authorization: Bearer $GITHUB_PAT" https://raw.githubusercontent.com/fairbay/baylee-skills/main/scripts/session_handoff.py -o "$P" 2>/dev/null; fi; [ -f "$P" ] && exec python3 "$P" inject; exit 0'
